hero.title: We build your digital presence, you run your business.
hero.subtitle: Custom digital agency. We create websites, apps and solutions that convert — delivered in 4 weeks.
hero.strategy_text: Every project is unique. We adapt our approach to your goals.

approach.title: An approach that changes everything
approach.block1_text: Frequent deliveries, continuous feedback. You see progress in real time.
approach.block2_text: Access to your project dashboard 24/7. No surprises on deadlines or budget.
approach.block3_text: From idea to product in 4 weeks. Our proven process guarantees deadlines.
approach.row1_pw: Firm schedule, delivery guaranteed in 4 weeks
approach.row3_classic: Unclear budget, surprises along the way
approach.row4_classic: You discover the result at the end

results.title: Concrete results for our clients
results.case1_context: Full website redesign + SEO · Results in 3 months
results.case3_context: Landing page + integrated CRM. Positive ROI in under 2 months.

process.title: Our process in 3 steps
process.step1_text: We listen to your goals, constraints and target audience. We define the exact project scope together.
process.step2_text: Mockups validated by you before coding. Agile development with weekly check-ins.
process.step3_text: Careful go-live + training. Support included for 3 months. We stay partners long-term.
process.reassurance: You're never alone. A dedicated contact guides you from A to Z, always available.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Response within 24h. First call free, no strings attached.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Try again or write to us directly.
